title: Bytes & Brews — Founders Lunch
location: Four Day Ray Brewing, 11671 Lantern Rd, Fishers IN
description: Weekly midweek lunch for lab members and guests. Talk shop, meet a founder, swap war stories. No agenda — just great people and cold craft beer.

title: Off the Grid — Nickel Plate Trail Walk
location: Nickel Plate Trail, Roy G. Holland Park Trailhead, Fishers IN
description: Disconnect your devices, connect with humans. 45-minute walk along Nickel Plate Trail. Meet at the IoT Lab — we walk together.

title: Mesh Network Monthly — Lab Meetup
location: Indiana IoT Lab, 9059 Technology Lane, Fishers IN
description: Monthly gathering for IoT innovators, entrepreneurs, and the intellectually curious. Demo night format — bring something to show or a problem to solve.

title: Signal & Noise — Startup Pitch Night
location: Indiana IoT Lab, 9059 Technology Lane, Fishers IN
description: Cut through the noise. Early-stage founders pitch their IoT ideas to the community. 5 minutes, honest feedback, no investors required.

title: Low Power Mode — Wednesday Happy Hour
description: Powering down for the week? Come recharge with fellow makers and founders. Informal, badge-free zone. Just show up.

title: Firmware Friday — IoT Hardware Workshop
location: Indiana IoT Lab, 9059 Technology Lane, Fishers IN
description: Hands-on workshop: sensors, microcontrollers, and connected devices. Bring your laptop. Components provided. Leave with something that actually blinks.

title: Packet Walk — Trail Stroll & Talk
location: Nickel Plate Trail, Roy G. Holland Park Trailhead, Fishers IN
description: Routing your thoughts in real life. Midday walk on Nickel Plate Trail — a moving standup for founders who think better on their feet. Meet at the lab.

title: Cold Boot Coffee — Morning Networking
location: Indiana IoT Lab, 9059 Technology Lane, Fishers IN
description: Start your process fresh. Casual morning networking for members, partners, and newcomers. Coffee's on. Stories are free.

title: Bytes & Brews — Founders Lunch
location: Four Day Ray Brewing, 11671 Lantern Rd, Fishers IN
description: Wednesday lunch, weekly ritual. Bring a friend, a problem, or just yourself. Good food and good company at Four Day Ray.

title: Open Source Night — Member Showcase
location: Indiana IoT Lab, 9059 Technology Lane, Fishers IN
description: Lab members open-source their ideas. Show what you're building, find a collaborator, ask for help. The best synergies happen here.

title: Random.pitch() — Startup Improv Night
location: Indiana IoT Lab, 9059 Technology Lane, Fishers IN
description: Draw a business idea from the hat. You have 5 minutes to pitch it — cold, unrehearsed, and on the spot. No slides. No safety net. Pure startup improv. Audience scores, everyone laughs, someone might actually build it.
